sources.title: Sovereign Influence Engine — Definition
key_points: system owns decision logic, memory, calibration, and authority
value loop is ingest -> resolve -> trust/authority -> score/decide -> execute -> outcome -> calibrate
system acts through structured policy-gated interventions
cx/sales example explicitly mentions deciding whether to schedule a meeting or send a message at a stage of silence

sources.title: Project Memory Candidates
key_points: Executive Decision Engine is core product layer
Decision Execution Engine bridges intelligence to monetization
output should be structured, reusable, and machine-ingestible
portable system prompt contract is root control layer
